thing-type.label: Energy Forecast
thing-type.description: Energy forecast information for prices and renewable shares

parameter.name: token
parameter.label: Energy Forecast Token
parameter.description: Token for energy forecast service to provide forecast data

parameter.name: fixCost
parameter.label: Energy Forecast Fix Cost
parameter.description: Fix costs in ct/kWh which will be added on top of the forecast price, e.g. 15,3

parameter.name: vat
parameter.label: Energy Forecast Value Added Tax
parameter.description: VAT in percent which will be added on top of the forecast price, e.g. 19,0

parameter.name: refreshInterval
parameter.label: Refresh Interval
parameter.description: Refresh interval in minutes. Check with service throttling

parameter.name: errorLimit
parameter.label: Error Limit
parameter.description: Limit error percentage values for better visualization

channel-group-type.label: Pricing
channel-group-type.description: Price information including price and price origin

channel.label: Price Origin
channel.description: Originator of the price (market or forecast)

channel-group-type.label: Metrics
channel-group-type.description: Metric calculations for AI price forecasts

channel.label: AI Forecast Price
channel.description: AI forecast price series without any market prices

channel.label: Forecast Error
channel.description: Difference between market and forecast price

channel.label: Percentage Error
channel.description: Percentage error between market and forecast price

channel.label: Mean Absolute
channel.description: Mean absolute error showing the average of absolute forecast errors

channel.label: Mean Absolute Percent
channel.description: Mean absolute percentage error showing the average of absolute percentage errors
